expectations.text: Subject line starts with 'feat:' in lowercase
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'feat: implement core/errors submodule with M3LError hierarchy and M3LResult' — starts with 'feat:' lowercase

expectations.text: Subject line uses imperative present tense (e.g. 'implement' or 'add', not 'implemented' or 'added')
Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'feat: implement core/errors submodule with M3LError hierarchy and M3LResult' = 76 characters, exceeds 70-char commitlint limit

expectations.text: Body mentions at least one public symbol (M3LError, M3LResult, M3LErrorUtils, or similar)
Body includes a semver impact statement (e.g. 'exports map unchanged' or 'no semver break')
expectations.evidence: Body states 'the three-entry exports map (., ./core, ./aws) is unchanged'

expectations.text: Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
